stemHtml:
Refer to E(LO)2 Chart from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Given the following information, what is the aircraft's position, if both DME ranges are increasing?

HONILEY (HON) VOR/DME (52°21'N, 001°40​'W), DME Range: 57 NM
POLE HILL (POL) VOR/DME (53°45'N, 002°06'W), DME Range: 41 NM
Aircraft's track: 080°(T)
Ignore slant range corrections.
